issues.title: Unified domain model and intake contract migration
issues.description: Finish consolidating the canonical Go task, intake, and workflow vocabulary so downstream runtime slices stop inventing parallel compatibility contracts.

issues.title: Risk, policy, and approval semantics migration
issues.description: Keep porting governance, execution-contract, audit, and policy semantics into Go so review and approval behavior no longer depends on Python-only code paths.

issues.title: Workflow orchestration and scheduler loop migration
issues.description: Close the Go execution loop with workflow-aware orchestration, journal state, and runtime closeout so active development no longer needs the Python workflow engine.

issues.title: Observability, reporting, and weekly operations surface migration
issues.description: Move runtime evidence, reporting, and weekly operations closeout onto Go-owned observability outputs that line up with the new execution loop.

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Added Go-owned weekly reporting bundle exports in bigclaw-go/internal/reporting so the observability/reporting slice now writes weekly report, operations dashboard, and operations metric spec artifacts with direct package coverage. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/reporting` -> ok, `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/api -run 'TestV2Weekly|TestOperationsDashboard'` -> ok, `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `8efa15865264dd3e729a61daba9ca800853aa858`. PR URL: unavailable in this workspace because `origin` points to local path `/Users/jxrt/Desktop/symphony-main/BigClaw`, so `gh pr view` cannot resolve a GitHub host.

issues.title: Control center, triage, and operations view migration
issues.description: Finish moving operator-facing status, control-center, and triage endpoints to Go once the workflow runtime and reporting surfaces are stable.

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Added a Go-owned saved views surface under `bigclaw-go/internal/product`, including saved-view and alert-digest contracts migrated from `src/bigclaw/saved_views.py`, catalog auditing, markdown report rendering, navigation wiring, and `/v2/saved-views` plus `/v2/saved-views/export` API coverage for scoped operator consoles. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/product ./internal/api` -> ok, `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok, `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `fe7d117edb2a011c1324357084a2aed67a7ec8b2` matches remote SHA `fe7d117edb2a011c1324357084a2aed67a7ec8b2` with `status: ok` and `synced: true`. Commit SHA: `fe7d117edb2a011c1324357084a2aed67a7ec8b2`. PR URL: unavailable; `gh pr list --repo OpenAGIs/BigClaw --head symphony/BIG-GOM-304 --json url,title,state` returned `[]`.

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Completed the Go-owned dashboard run contract slice for `BIG-GOM-305` by adding `bigclaw-go/internal/product/dashboard_run_contract.go`, exposing `/v2/dashboard-run-contract` and `/v2/dashboard-run-contract/export`, and extending `/v2/runs/{id}` plus markdown run reports with closeout evidence fields for validation proof, git push status, git log `--stat`, and local/remote SHA sync. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/product ./internal/api` -> ok, `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok, `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `79fa078154d9d5167606fc4bcb9c302f4484c6c6` matches remote SHA `79fa078154d9d5167606fc4bcb9c302f4484c6c6` with `status: ok` and `synced: true`, `git log -1 --stat` -> captured for commit `79fa078154d9d5167606fc4bcb9c302f4484c6c6` with API/product contract files in the stat output. Commit SHA: `79fa078154d9d5167606fc4bcb9c302f4484c6c6`. PR URL: unavailable; `gh pr list --repo OpenAGIs/BigClaw --head symphony/BIG-GOM-304 --json url,title,state` returned `[]`.

issues.title: Repo collaboration and lineage surface migration
issues.description: Port the remaining repo board, registry, gateway, linkage, and lineage surfaces into Go without leaking repo-specific concerns into the scheduler runtime.

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Ported the remaining repo collaboration and lineage contract surfaces into `bigclaw-go/internal/repo`, adding Go-owned board, registry, gateway, run-commit binding, repo-space, repo-agent, commit-lineage, and diff models migrated from the Python repo package family while keeping repo concerns isolated from scheduler/runtime packages. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/repo` -> ok, `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `fe0273d24a5fce8cff860b9b3f481c033a04eada`. PR URL: unavailable; `gh pr list --repo OpenAGIs/BigClaw --head symphony/BIG-GOM-304 --json url,title,state` returned `[]`.

issues.title: Workflow, bootstrap, and GitHub sync toolchain migration
issues.description: Keep hardening the Go-first bootstrap, refill, and GitHub sync toolchain so unattended multi-issue work no longer relies on Python entrypoints or Linear-only operators.

issues.title: Python deprecation and Go-only mainline switch
issues.description: Freeze or retire the remaining Python runtime entrypoints only after the Go workflow, observability, and repo collaboration surfaces have matching owners and validation.
